mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox (seq, domain, event_type, source, payload, status, created_at) VALUES ( NEXTVAL('outbox_seq_seq'), #{domain}, #{eventType}, #{source}, #{payload}::jsonb, 'PENDING', NOW() )

INSERT INTO outbox (seq, domain, event_type, source, payload, status, created_at) VALUES
( NEXTVAL('outbox_seq_seq'), #{o.domain}, #{o.eventType}, #{o.source}, #{o.payload}::jsonb, 'PENDING', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(0) FROM outbox WHERE status = 'PENDING'
SELECT id, seq, domain, event_type, source, payload::text AS payload, status, created_at, sent_at FROM outbox WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY seq ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE outbox SET status = 'FAILED' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM outbox WHERE status = 'SENT' AND sent_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
